flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Boston University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.8k → $68.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Boston University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.8k → $68.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Boston University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (84.1% → 74.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Boston University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
